summary.narrative: Recession risk is elevated, which may weigh on consumer willingness to spend on travel. The Fed is expected to hold rates steady at the next meeting (98% probability). Energy costs are elevated with oil above $80, which may increase operating and travel expenses. Inflation expectations remain contained.
